name:
2ND SUN AFTER CHRISTMAS [ABC]
Epiphany replaces in ADLA

readings.citation:
Ps 72:1-2, 7-8, 10-11, 12-13, R see Jn 1:14
The Word of God became man and lived among us.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 72:1-2, 7-8, 10-11, 12-13, R see Jn 1:14
The Word of God became man and lived among us.

readings.summary: God destined us for adoption to himself through Jesus Christ.

Glory to you, O Christ, proclaimed to the Gentiles;
Glory to you, O Christ, believed in throughout the world!
The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us.

antiphons.text:
When a profound silence covered all things and night was in
the middle of its course, your all-powerful Word, O Lord,
bounded from heaven’s royal throne.

To all who would accept him,
he gave the power to become children of God.
